# Variable Selection {variable-selection}

```{r variable-selection-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/variable-selection-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/variable-selection/"
)
```

```{r child-variable-selection, child="../lecture-content/27-variable-selection.Rmd"}
```
